Description

JSON Marshalling Support.

  • Uses of JsonTokenReader.Settings in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

    Fields in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json declared as JsonTokenReader.Settings
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final JsonTokenReader.Settings
    JsonTokenReader.Settings.DEFAULT
    Default canonical setting: no string trimming.
    protected final JsonTokenReader.Settings
    JsonTokenReader.settings
    Cursor-level settings (currently just trimStrings).
    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json with parameters of type JsonTokenReader.Settings
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    JsonTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings)
    Constructor with explicit JsonTokenReader.Settings.
     
    JsonTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings, JsonParserSession session)
    Constructor used by JsonParser.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling parser's session in so that JsonTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the existing databind path.

  • Uses of JsonTokenReader.Settings in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5

    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5 with parameters of type JsonTokenReader.Settings
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Json5TokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings, Json5ParserSession session)
    Constructor used by Json5ParserSession.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling session through so that JsonTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the JSON5 databind path.

  • Uses of JsonTokenReader.Settings in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l

    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l with parameters of type JsonTokenReader.Settings
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Json5lTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings, Json5lParserSession session)
    Constructor used by Json5lParserSession.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling session through so that JsonTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the JSON5L databind path.
